groom.description: Groom the backlog with the human: classify work-type, clarify, resolve relationships, label readiness.
groom.argumentHint: [issue numbers or URLs, or empty for the whole open backlog]

run.description: Queue every ready-for-agent, unblocked issue and dispatch one issue thread each, then report the handoff table.
run.argumentHint: [issue numbers or URLs, or empty for all ready-for-agent]

setup.description: Scaffold playbooks, provision GitHub role labels, choose parallel/sequential and scaffold worktree isolation, identify seed/checks, and verify readiness.

diagnose.description: Reproduce, locate, and fix a bug, confirming the failing path passes.

plan.description: Decide whether an enhancement needs a plan, write it, and stop at the approval gate.

implement.description: Build an approved plan or an agreed small enhancement.

refactor.description: Make a behavior-preserving change locked by tests.

verify.description: Run the checks and verify behavior against acceptance criteria, looping fixes until they pass or cap.

evidence.description: Capture human-facing proof once verification converges, indexed by the PR body.

adversarial-review.description: Run reviewer and fixer subagents on a PR until LGTM or the iteration cap.
